response: In the arena where dreams come alive, ladies and gentlemen, it's time to strive. Registration is open for the tournament ahead, the IMG ICEP 3-on-3 Co-ed tournament. The event will be held on Thursday, June 15th at Grand Slam in Malvern. Games will begin at approximately 5:30 PM, concluding by 8:00 PM. Similar to past years, the tournament format will consist of sixteen teams divided into four groups. Each game will be approximately 10 minutes long with an expected minimum of two games. Please note, teams must be co-ed to be eligible for play with a maximum of four members per team. Please email Geoff Kenneck, Abhi Bhalla, [generic placeholder] and myself by Wednesday, June 7th with your team’s name and roster. If you would like to play but are unable to form a team, email us and we will look to partner you up. Given court and time constraints the maximum number of teams we can accommodate is sixteen. Slots will be allocated on a first come-first serve basis with late entries placed on a waiting list. Lastly, everyone is invited to come out and watch the action even if you are unable to participate in the tournament. Food and beverages will be provided. Final details will be sent out after we complete the registration process. Thanks for all your support and we look forward to a fun evening. Please let us know if you have any questions. Sincerely, [generic placeholder]
